name: Optimus Prime
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Semi-Truck) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 7/7 and it gains trample and vigilance. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, create two Energon tokens.
flavor_text: "Freedom is the right of all sentient beings."
design_notes: Optimus Prime is designed as the set's mythic face character. His colors (White, Red, Green) represent his role as a principled leader (W), his vehicular combat prowess (R), and his connection to the vital life-force/growth of the Autobot cause (G). The Alt-Mode provides the necessary mechanical morphology, allowing him to transition from a sturdy humanoid leader into an unstoppable heavy vehicle. His ability to generate Energon tokens on attack supports the resource-management theme while rewarding the player for committing their leader to combat.
